chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Appeal No.S-143 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A No.10407/2024 26.02.2025 Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G Sindh *** No one is present on behalf of the applicant perhaps due to strike of the Bar. A perusal of the record reveals that appellant/accused was convicted by the learned Trial Court, however, during pendency of the present appeal parties entered into a compromise and accordingly appellant was acquitted of the charge by way of compromise, subject to deposit of Diyat amount in respect of minor legal heirs of deceased namely (i) Ali Raza, (ii) Shahzad Ali and (iii) Jabir Hussain, which was subsequently deposited by the appellant per office note affixed at the back of Order dated 04.06.2021. It was further directed in the said Order that the Diyat amount be invested in some profitable scheme till attaining the age of majority by the above minors. Through listed application the applicant/mother stated the one of the minors namely Ali Raza has passed away by his natural death, therefore, his share may be transferred in favour of the remaining two living minors/legal heirs. Alongwith application she has also attached the photocopy of death certificate. Learned Assistant P.G after going through the record raised no objection for transfer of share of deceased minor Ali Raza in favour of remaining two living minors. In view of the above, listed application is disposed of with directions to the Accountant of this Court to transfer the share of deceased minor Ali Raza in favour of remaining minors Shahzad Ali and Jabir Hussain and invest the same in some profitable scheme till attaining the age of majority by the said remaining living minors, as directed earlier in Order dated 04.06.2021.

Learned Assistant P.G after going through the record raised no objection for transfer of share of deceased minor Ali Raza in favour of remaining two living minors. In view of the above, listed application is disposed of with directions to the Accountant of this Court to transfer the share of deceased minor Ali Raza in favour of remaining minors Shahzad Ali and Jabir Hussain and invest the same in some profitable scheme till attaining the age of majority by the said remaining living minors, as directed earlier in Order dated 04.06.2021. Listed application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
